name: Katydid Nimbus
description:
[Github Repo](https://github.com/sknodel11/construction-calc)
With multiple construction projects happening at CSU, students are being exposed to more pollutants. This is a simple calculator to see the extra exposure students can be exposed to while on campus in terms of hours exposed. A comparison of how much contaminants a student would normally experience in Fort Collins for the same duration is also provided.
